site.title: Themadhood's Trinkets
site.tagline: Physical and digital goods created under the Themadhood ecosystem.
site.metaDescription: Themadhood's Trinkets handles small goods, accessories, and collectible trinkets released under Themadhood goods.

footer.title: Themadhood's Trinkets
footer.line2: Themadhood's Trinkets operates as a parent entity for affiliated projects.

hero.headline: Themadhood's Trinkets
body: Themadhood's Trinkets is the trinkets and small goods division within Themadhood's Goods, focused on producing accessories and collectible releases while maintaining the visual style and themes associated with Themadhood.

about.title: ABOUT US
body: Themadhood's Trinkets operates as both an independent creative workshop and a structured branch within the larger Themadhood ecosystem. Its purpose is to design and produce small goods, accessories, and collectible items that reflect the themes, ideas, and visual identity developed across Themadhood projects.

Through small releases, accessories, and collectible trinkets, Themadhood's Trinkets provides a framework for organizing small goods while allowing each product line to develop its own style and focus. This structure ensures that goods remain connected to the broader creative ecosystem while still supporting unique craftsmanship and experimentation.

items.title: Other/ Routed Through Us
items.body: Requests that don’t clearly fall under a specific trinkets subtree, including custom or experimental small goods.

contact.title: CONNECT WITH US
contact.note: GitHub Pages is static-only. If you want submissions, wire this up to Formspree/Netlify Forms later.
